summary: Tested both backend and frontend for Riset Hibrida landing page + mock Duitku payment flow + chatbot. 7/7 backend tests pass. Landing page renders all sections; full checkout flow (Skill Pack -> form -> mock-payment -> success) works end-to-end with idempotent callbacks. Chatbot backend API responds correctly via Gemini.

ui_bugs.issue: Chat toggle button at bottom-right may be overlapped/occluded by 'Made with Emergent' badge in the same corner, intermittently preventing clicks. Consider repositioning to bottom-24 or moving the WhatsApp/chat widgets.

issues: Chat button (bottom-right) and Emergent badge stack in same area - z-index/positioning may collide on smaller viewports

action_items: (Optional) Reposition ChatbotWidget to avoid overlap with bottom-right Emergent badge - e.g., bottom-24 right-6.

Backend MOCKED items: Duitku payment gateway is fully mocked via /mock-payment route - documented in code. Email dispatch is MOCKED (only prints to stdout). Confirm both behaviours are intended for MVP.
critical_code_review_comments: Email dispatch is MOCKED (print statement only) in /api/payment-callback - no real Nodemailer integration.
/api/create-payment uses NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL with localhost default; on preview env this still works since frontend uses relative path resolution, but consider using FRONTEND_URL env var.
CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True is permissive - acceptable for MVP but should be locked down in production.
Order creation doesn't validate duplicates or rate-limit, could allow spam orders.
Slot decrement only happens for 'master' product on successful payment-callback - logic is correct and atomic via $inc.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed test orders during pytest run (orderId starts with RH-, identifiable via customer.name prefix TEST_).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py covers: slots, create-payment, idempotent payment-callback, download token, error paths, chat. All endpoints work via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Frontend full checkout flow verified end-to-end. Only minor cosmetic concern: chat toggle button position vs Emergent badge.
rca of the issue: Chat toggle click timeout: Playwright waited for chat-input visibility after clicking [data-testid=toggle-chat]. The button is visible in screenshot but click was likely intercepted by the floating 'Made with Emergent' badge that sits at bottom-right corner with high z-index. Mitigation: relocate chatbot widget to bottom-24 right-6 or increase z-index above the platform badge.
